alien_graveyard.mapping: The target is a single long prefix-sum dependency. A parallel prefix tree would regroup floating-point additions and is not bit-isomorphic, so the safe experiment was a direct sequential Cumsum add loop that preserves element order.

alien_artifact.proof_obligation: For Cumsum, each output i must be produced by the same ordered recurrence acc_0 = 0.0, acc_i = acc_{i-1} + x_i, with no reassociation, no changed NaN/signed-zero behavior, and no RNG or tie-breaking surface.

baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline 'eval/cumsum_4m_f64_1d' -- --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 10 --noplot

candidate.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline 'eval/cumsum_4m_f64_1d' -- --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 10 --noplot
candidate.source_status: production hunk removed; no runtime source lever kept

isomorphism.ordering: candidate preserved ordered recurrence, but it was removed because the same-worker benchmark regressed
isomorphism.floating_point: test-only diff proves the existing dense one-line Cumsum path remains bit-identical to the literal path, including signed zero and NaN propagation through the same left-to-right recurrence

validation.name: focused_cumulative_tests
validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax cumulative -- --nocapture

validation.name: large_single_line_cumsum_test
validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax large_dense_f64_cumsum_single_line_matches_literal_path -- --nocapture

validation.name: crate_check
validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets

validation.name: crate_clippy
validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings
validation.result: passed on fmd after removing rejected production hunk

validation.name: fmt_and_diff
validation.command: cargo fmt --check --package fj-lax && git diff --check -- crates/fj-lax/src/reduction.rs

next_target: Close frankenjax-4ywuo as rejected and reprofile before selecting the next no-gaps perf bead; if returning to one-line Cumsum, file a contract bead for tolerance-based parallel prefix because bit-exact FP order blocks tree-scan regrouping.
